历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 22337, 28267, 26287, and 27965 respectively, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend, with a baseline of about 27965 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Province for Physics Category was 64 in 2021, 68 in 2022, 73 in 2023, 71 in 2024, 65 in 2025, and 70 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 7.7% compared to 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, reflecting an enhancement in overall strength; there was negative academic misconduct news in 2022, but no major negative events in recent years; Douyin popularity evaluation is 'average', with overall popularity in the middle to lower range among 985 universities, low exposure on short video platforms, and relatively stable application attention; Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grass Science are all A- level, with distinctive agricultural and forestry disciplines, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of agricultural and forestry majors is generally stable, while engineering majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering are highly popular; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is about 521,000, a significant increase from 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 358,000, an increase of about 37.6% from 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has risen from 417 in 2021 to 463 in 2025, showing a continuous upward trend; the university is located in Xianyang, Shaanxi, a cross-province enrollment, with a moderate enrollment scale in Jiangsu (about 65-73 people), with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 27965 in 2025, the easing effect of an enrollment expansion of about 7.7% in 2026, the intensified competition due to a significant increase of about 37.6% in Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu, and the positive signal of the university's rising Soft Science ranking, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will decline (increase in number) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 29305, ranging from 28805 to 29805.
